raw_output:
For beginners in photography, Adobe Lightroom is a highly recommended photo editing tool. It offers a user-friendly interface and a wide range of features suitable for various photographic needs. Some of its key benefits include:

1. Non-destructive editing: You can make changes to your photos without altering the original file. This allows you to experiment with different edits without fear of ruining your images.
2. Organizational tools: Lightroom provides powerful organization and management options, such as the ability to categorize and search for your photos easily.
3. Creative editing controls: The software offers advanced adjustments for exposure, color, and detail, enabling you to create stunning photos with a professional touch.
4. Learning resources: Adobe provides numerous tutorials and learning materials to help beginners familiarize themselves with the tool's features and improve their photography skills.

While it is available as a one-time purchase (Lightroom Classic), the subscription-based version, Adobe Lightroom CC, offers even more benefits such as cloud storage, seamless syncing across devices, and regular updates with new features. If you're looking for a comprehensive photo editing solution that can grow with your skills, I would strongly recommend considering Adobe Lightroom on a subscription basis.
